title: SQL: EXCEPT is picky and doesn't work
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT, value VARCHAR(50), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value) VALUES (1, 'test1'), (2, 'test2'), (3, NULL);
SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT 2);
SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT CAST(NULL AS INT));
SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT 1);
key_bug_features: EXCEPT clause fails with type casting
